stepFileId.description: ID of the previously uploaded STEP file (returned by the file upload endpoint)

meshPrecision.description: Mesh linear deflection. When meshRelative is true (default), this is a fraction of each edge's length (e.g. 0.005 = 0.5%). When false, it is an absolute value in model units (mm for STEP).
meshPrecision.title: MeshPrecision

meshAngle.description: Angular deflection in radians for mesh tessellation — controls curvature approximation. Smaller values produce smoother curved surfaces.
meshAngle.title: MeshAngle

meshRelative.description: Use size-aware relative deflection per face. When true, meshPrecision is a fraction of each edge's length. Set to false for absolute deflection in model units.

internalVerticesMode.description: Add interior vertices for better curved face fidelity (slower, set false for speed).

controlSurfaceDeflection.description: Extra post-pass refining triangles that bulge beyond the deflection (slower, set false for speed).

draco.description: Draco compression options. If omitted, sensible defaults are used (level 7, 14/10/12/8/12 bits).

useDraco.description: Apply Draco geometry compression to the glTF output. Defaults to true for the *-with-draco endpoints.

dracoCompressionLevel.description: Draco compression level (0 = fastest/largest, 10 = slowest/smallest). Typical good default is 7.

dracoQuantizePositionBits.description: Quantization bits for vertex positions (higher = more precise, larger file). Typical: 14.

dracoQuantizeNormalBits.description: Quantization bits for normal vectors. Typical: 10.

dracoQuantizeTexcoordBits.description: Quantization bits for texture coordinates. Typical: 12.

dracoQuantizeColorBits.description: Quantization bits for vertex colors. Typical: 8.

dracoQuantizeGenericBits.description: Quantization bits for generic vertex attributes. Typical: 12.

dracoUnifiedQuantization.description: Use unified quantization across all meshes (better when meshes share a coordinate frame).

draco.title: DracoCompressionOptions

schema.description: Convert a STEP file to Draco-compressed glTF with default settings. Upload the STEP file first, then pass its ID here.
schema.title: StepToGltfWithDracoBody
